promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch after the geometry/manifold fence reduction because it closes the ordinary refined-fuel top-level root with a compact quarantine and admission-boundary surface.

selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The geometry/manifold A2-mid batch was used as an anchor so the digest's derived-geometry sequencing stays tied to a stricter nearby fence packet.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until the last ordinary refined-fuel top-level batch was reduced into a smaller reusable packet.

raw_source_reread_reason: The physics-fuel digest parent batch plus the existing geometry/manifold comparison anchor were sufficient to isolate the reusable quarantine gates and preserve the live overread risks for this pass.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the digest's strongest quarantine, rewrite, salvage, and sequencing gates without rebuilding the full candidate inventory.
They keep the digest's operator-only logic primary while preserving the nearby geometry fence as a comparison anchor.
They remain compact, source-linked, and proposal-side for later translation work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain narrative bundles, candidate-term overreads, or downstream-only hypotheses rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as explicit risks, but not to promote them into active law.
